standards.name: AIUC-1 agent security, safety, and reliability
standards.note: AgentCert evidence can support preparation for independent AIUC-1-style reviews; it is not an official certification.

standards.name: NIST AI Agent Standards Initiative
standards.note: AgentCert evidence aligns with secure, interoperable, auditable agent deployment goals.

standards.name: OWASP Agentic AI threats and mitigations
standards.note: AgentCert scenarios cover prompt injection, tool misuse, excessive agency, and runtime action governance.
